name: @attack/rule-schema
description: Canonical declarative rule schema (ADR-002/ADR-004): types, validator, safe evaluator, JSON-Schema builder. Shared by the engine, brochure, and VSCode. Built to CommonJS dist + .d.ts; zero runtime deps.

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && tsc -p tsconfig.json && tsc -p tsconfig.esm.json && node -e "require('fs').writeFileSync('dist/esm/package.json', JSON.stringify({type:'module'})+'\n')"
